## Issue

What's wrong or missing with the current documentation?

- [ ] Unclear or confusing
- [ ] Outdated or incorrect
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Needs more examples
- [ ] Typo or grammar error
- [ ] Could be better organized

## Checklist

- [ ] I have verified the documentation is actually incorrect or unclear
- [ ] My suggestion is clear and actionable
- [ ] I have checked for obvious grammar/spelling errors
